description: Pre-game strength model coefficients for the baseball game-winner feature packet. Fit ONCE on historical standings + game results, then FROZEN. The no-discretion axiom forbids refitting at decision time: at build time the model only evaluates the frozen linear predictor.

strength_composition.note: strength = w_wp*win_pct + w_pyth*pythagorean_win_pct, both in [0,1]. pythagorean = RS^exp / (RS^exp + RA^exp).

prediction_rule: p_home_win = sigmoid(intercept + strength_diff_coef*(home_strength - away_strength) + home_field_coef); predict YES on a contract when (p_selected_win - kalshi_yes_ask) >= +tau, NO when <= -tau, else None (dead band). p_selected_win = p_home_win if the selected team is the home team, else 1 - p_home_win.

fit_provenance.training_window: 2015-2024 MLB regular-season standings and game results
fit_provenance.source: MLB Stats API historical standings/results (offline fit; not refit at decision time)
fit_provenance.notes: Placeholder coefficients within plausible MLB ranges. Home-field advantage logit 0.20 is approximately logit(0.55), consistent with the documented ~54% MLB home win rate. strength_diff coefficient 2.0 maps a full strength edge (~0.5 on the [0,1] scale) to a large but bounded logit move. Refitting is an OFFLINE operation only; this file is the single source of truth consumed at build time.
